page_content:
Courses offered by this department are listed under the acronym FMSC.

Admission to the Major

Upper-level students who wish to change or declare a major in Family Science can only do so through a Change of Major Workshop. To register for a workshop, visit the School of Public Health website (https:// sph.umd.edu/academics/advising-resources/undergraduate-center- academic-success-and-achievement/casa-advising/casa-declare-sph- major/). Students must register in advance in order to attend a Change of Major Workshop. Freshman or admitted high school seniors may declare the FMSC major at orientation.
